ddls:
CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the county is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the county */,
  "area_sq_km" REAL /* Area of the county in square kilometers */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the county health department */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the county's centroid */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the county's centroid */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the county (population per square kilometer) */,
  "median_income" REAL /* Median income of the county */,
  "poverty_rate" REAL /* Poverty rate of the county */,
  "health_rank" INTEGER /* Health ranking of the county */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health indicator */,
  "indicator_name" TEXT /* Name of the health indicator */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the health indicator */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the health indicator */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data (e.g., incidence rate, mortality rate) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the indicator information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "county_health_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health data record */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* ID of the county */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the health indicator */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was collected */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the health indicator */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the data was last updated */,
  "confidence_interval_low" REAL /* Lower bound of the confidence interval for the value */,
  "confidence_interval_high" REAL /* Upper bound of the confidence interval for the value */,
  "standard_error" REAL /* Standard error of the value */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the data */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the data record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_county_health_data_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_county_health_data_data_source FOREIGN KEY ("data_source") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_county_health_data_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_id") REFERENCES health_indicators ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the data source */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data collection */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the data source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the data source information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., epidemiologist, researcher, policymaker) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or organization the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the health data record being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client used to access the data */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES county_health_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the health program */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the health program */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the program */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the program */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the program */,
  "program_type" TEXT /* Type of the health program */,
  "target_population" TEXT /* Target population for the program */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding for the program */,
  "project_manager" TEXT /* Name of the project manager */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "county_programs" (
  "association_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each association */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the health program */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* ID of the county */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the program in the county */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the program in the county */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the program */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the program in the county */,
  "target_population" TEXT /* Target population for the program in the county */,
  "project_manager" TEXT /* Name of the project manager in the county */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("association_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_county_programs_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES health_programs ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_county_programs_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "program_indicators" (
  "association_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each association */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the health program */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the health indicator */,
  "target_value" REAL /* Target value for the indicator in the program */,
  "current_value" REAL /* Current value of the indicator in the program */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the target value was last updated */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the target value */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the indicator in the program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("association_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_program_indicators_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES health_programs ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_program_indicators_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_id") REFERENCES health_indicators ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the health data record the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the data file */,
  "file_description" TEXT /* Description of the data file */,
  "file_version" INTEGER /* Version number of the data file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES county_health_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "readme_files" (
  "readme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each readme file */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the health data record the readme file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the readme file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the readme file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the readme file */,
  "file_description" TEXT /* Description of the readme file */,
  "file_version" INTEGER /* Version number of the readme file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("readme_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_readme_files_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES county_health_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the user role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the user role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the role */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the role information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_role_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role assignment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "assigned_date" TEXT /* Date the role was assigned to the user */,
  "valid_until" TEXT /* Date the role assignment is valid until */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the role assignment */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the role assignment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_assignments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_assignments_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)
